title: Minimum Swaps to Make Strings Equal
titleCn: 交换字符使得字符串相同

testcases.input: s1 = "xx", s2 = "yy" Output: 1 Explanation: Swap s1[0] and s2[1], s1 = "yx", s2 = "yx".
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Swap s1[0] and s2[1], s1 = "yx", s2 = "yx".

testcases.input: s1 = "xy", s2 = "yx" Output: 2 Explanation: Swap s1[0] and s2[0], s1 = "yy", s2 = "xx". Swap s1[0] and s2[1], s1 = "xy", s2 = "xy". Note that you cannot swap s1[0] and s1[1] to make s1 equal to "yx", cause we can only swap chars in different strings.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Swap s1[0] and s2[0], s1 = "yy", s2 = "xx". Swap s1[0] and s2[1], s1 = "xy", s2 = "xy". Note that you cannot swap s1[0] and s1[1] to make s1 equal to "yx", cause we can only swap chars in different strings.
